description: 1-800-Flowers.com is an e-commerce site for ordering flowers and gifts for delivery in the United States. It offers floral arrangements, plants, gourmet baskets, and related gifting products through its online storefront and florist network.
summary: 1800flowers.com exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.1800flowers.com/r/api/conversational/ai/v1/a/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
